mapper.insert:
insert into dish_flavor (dish_id, name, value) VALUES
(#{f.dishId},#{f.name},#{f.value})

insert into dish (name, category_id, price, image, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{name},#{categoryId},#{price},#{image},#{description},#{status},#{createTime},#{updateTime},#{createUser},#{updateUser})
mapper.update:
update dish
name =#{name},
price =#{price},
category_id =#{categoryId},
image =#{image},
description =#{description},
status =#{status},
update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser}, where id =#{id}
update dish set status = #{enable} where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete FROM dish_flavor Where dish_id in
#{id}

delete FROM dish Where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select id, name, category_id, price, image, description, status,update_time from dish where id =#{id}
SELECT id, dish_id, name, value from dish_flavor where dish_id =#{id}
select SUM(status) from dish where id in #{id}
select id,name, category_id, price, image, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user from dish where category_id = #{categoryId}
select id,name, category_id, price, image, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user from dish where category_id = #{categoryId} and status = #{status}
